components.name: Avatar
components.description: A circular image element for representing users, with automatic fallback to initials when the image is unavailable. Built on @radix-ui/react-avatar.

examples.name: Types
examples.description: Image avatar with photo and text avatar with initials fallback.

examples.name: Sizes
examples.description: Small (32px), Default (40px), and Large (56px) avatar sizes.

props.name: className
props.description: Override styles — use Tailwind size-* to control diameter (default size-10 = 40px)

props.name: alt
props.description: Descriptive alt text for screen readers (on AvatarImage)

designTokens.description: Ring color used in Avatar Group (border-background)

bestPractices.do: Always provide AvatarFallback alongside AvatarImage — broken images leave empty circles without it.
bestPractices.dont: Omit AvatarFallback when using AvatarImage, even if the image URL is reliable.

bestPractices.do: Use 1-2 uppercase initials in AvatarFallback that meaningfully represent the user.
bestPractices.dont: Use a full name or long string in AvatarFallback — it overflows the circle.

bestPractices.do: Set delayMs={0} on AvatarFallback when you know the image will not load (e.g., no src provided).
bestPractices.dont: Leave the default 600ms delay when intentionally showing fallback — it causes a visible flash.

keyboard.action: Avatar is non-interactive — wrap in a button if a click action is needed

notes: AvatarImage requires a descriptive alt attribute
When AvatarFallback is the only content, it is visible text and does not need extra aria attributes
For Avatar Group with a +N overflow item, add aria-label to that avatar (e.g., aria-label="5 more members")

related.name: Badge
related.desc: Pair with Avatar in list rows to display user role or plan tier.
